resolved.resolution: The direct B0-to-V2 claim is explicitly excluded from RC2 because the fresh five-pair replication is mixed. The independently reproducible V1-to-V2 incremental confirmation remains the release-driving performance result.
GitHub Release artifacts with SHA-256 checksums are the V2 distribution route; Maven Central publication is out of scope for this release.
Apache-2.0 LICENSE, SECURITY.md, and CONTRIBUTING.md are present; support and conduct policy are documented for RC qualification.
Commit 973257e passed a remote clean-clone qualification with an empty isolated Maven repository and the full PetClinic quickstart through semantic smoke.
Six shipped report families are registered and passed scripts/check-v2-schema-compatibility.ps1.
GitHub Actions run 29297537251 passed publication safety and Maven tests on a fresh Ubuntu/JDK 26 runner.
